text: - 14.12 NOTWITHSTANDING ANYTHING HEREIN TO THE CONTRARY, IN NO EVENT WILL CONTRACTOR BE LIABLE TO SUBCONTRACTOR FOR ANY CONSEQUENTIAL LOSSES OR  DAMAGES,  WHETHER  ARISING  IN  CONTRACT,  WARRANTY,  TORT  (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STRICT LIABILITY  OR  OTHERWISE,  INCLUDING,  BUT  NOT  LIMITED  TO LOSSES OF FUTURE OPPORTUNITY, BUSINESS, BONDING CAPACITY, REPUTATION OR FINANCING.
